name: blueprint-mode
description: Documented intent for AI-assisted development: ADRs, specs, patterns, requirements, DESIGN.md, and a separate design tree for UX decisions

interface.shortDescription: Keep human intent explicit for AI agents
interface.longDescription: Blueprint Mode helps teams document architecture decisions, UX decisions, requirements, boundaries, and good and bad patterns so AI-assisted development stays consistent over time.
defaultPrompt: Onboard this repo into Blueprint Mode
Record an ADR for this architecture choice
Show the current Blueprint docs in this repo
